Hi Guys,
What I understand is now that dmaap starts has changed a little bit (it's slower?) and when SDC tries to create a topic, it has an error.
there are several ways to fix it (one being proposal from fiachra to "force" onap to deploy DMaaP sooner).
But, IMHO, I think it's not the right way as when we'll have a "fast" SDC start and a "fast" deployment of ONAP, we'll face the issue again.
So I think we should more to the work in SDC:

* if having this topic is mandatory for SDC, then it should crash if not having it
* if having this topic is optional, it should retries once in a while to check if the topic creation is doable

@SDC team, what's your point of view?

Hi Krzysztof,
Not good news I'm afraid. SDC (and maybe others) are using pre loaded zookeeper apiKeys.
On upgrading the kafka/zk images, I removed what I thought was redundant data, but in fact it was preloading the keys.
To remove this problem, all MR clients that are using these keys would need to change also. 
So... my proposal is to replace the keys and look to flag this with the relevant parties. (SDC and possibly Policy)
